title: CPAP Order Status — Poor Handling
scenario: Customer is upset about a delayed CPAP. Agent is curt, dismissive, and fails to own the issue.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yeah hi, I ordered a CPAP machine over a month ago and nobody's told me anything. What's going on?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'd have to look it up. What's your name?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Robert Harrison. My doctor sent the prescription already.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hold on... okay it's stuck in authorization.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: For a month? That can't be right. Can you push it through?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's up to the insurance, not us. You'd have to call them.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This is ridiculous, I can't sleep without this thing.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand, but there's nothing I can do. You'll just have to wait.
